summary_en: Articles amendment to enable board-authorized share repurchases under Companies Act §165(2). No specific acquisition limit, share count, or price disclosed. Shareholder vote scheduled June 26, 2026. Effective date June 26, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Articles of Incorporation Amendment Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Wellness Communications Corporation announced on May 20, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to submit a proposed amendment to the articles of incorporation to the 20th ordinary general shareholders' meeting scheduled for June 26, 2026. The amendment would add Article 11 to Chapter 2 (Shares), enabling the company to acquire its own shares by board resolution under Companies Act §165(2). No acquisition limit in yen or share count is specified in this notice; the amendment grants the board discretionary authority to execute repurchases in response to market conditions. The stated purpose is to improve capital efficiency, enhance share value, and establish a framework for flexible capital allocation policy. The amendment is conditional on shareholder approval at the June 26 meeting, with effectiveness also scheduled for that date.
